creator: chukharev@mail.ru
text:
I had similar messages (and some other as well) on my laptop with 7-STABLE
when I had no procfs mounted. procfs is mandatory for gnome, and probably
for some other programs. Please try to add to /etc/fstab a line
proc	/proc	procfs	rw	0	0
and reboot.

-- 
V. Chukharev
